| "The plan is 90% complete — I'll note the gaps" | An incomplete plan is a failed plan. PLAN_CREATED requires empty OPEN_DECISIONS and DIFFERENCES_FROM_AGREEMENT present. |
| Multiple valid interpretations with material implementation impact | → Return `STATUS=NEEDS_CLARIFICATION` |

| "Tests pass, phase is done" | TDD_GREEN_EXIT=0 is necessary but not sufficient — Truths, Artifacts, and Wiring must all reconcile before PHASE_EXIT_READY=true. |
